      "それは、ハレディ思想に大きく傾倒するイスラエルの宗教的シオニストユダヤ人コミュニティの一部についてです。",
      "それは、イスラエル国家に対する、イスラエルがアツルタ・デ・ゲウラーであると信じている人々の姿勢についてです。",
      "それは、トタニまたはトタニ・レウミとしても知られるユダヤ人についてです。",

      "それは、トーラー学習の真剣さとユダヤ法のより厳格な遵守に関わる人々についてです。",
      "それは、ハレディ世界から来てナハル・ハレディに参加する人々についてです。",
      "それは、イスラエルに移住し、国家を支持するアメリカのイェシヴィシュ・ユダヤ人についてです。",
      "それは、特定の宗教的慣習においてより厳格になる宗教的シオニスト青年の特定のグループの広範なプロセスについてです。"
    ],

About: It is about the portion of the Religious Zionist Jewish community in Israel which inclines significantly toward Haredi ideology.
It is about the approach to the State of Israel by those who believe that Israel is Atchalta De'Geulah.
It is about Jews also known as Torani or Torani-Leumi.
It is about people who classify themselves as Charedi Leumi or Chardal.
It is about those who try to keep the Mitzvot strictly while being involved in the national life in the state.
It is about the Anglo Orthodox religious sector who follow a Charedi lifestyle.
It is about those connected to the seriousness of Torah learning and stricter observance of Jewish Law.
It is about those coming from the Haredi world who join Nahal Haredi.
It is about American yeshivish Jews who moved to Israel and support the state.
It is about a broad process of certain groups of Religious Zionist youth becoming more strict in certain religious observances.
Affects: It affects the Religious Zionist Jewish community in Israel.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Haredi ideology.
It is associated with the Religious Zionist Jewish community in Israel.
It is associated with the concept of Atchalta De'Geulah.
It is associated with the term Torani.
It is associated with the term Torani-Leumi.
It is associated with the Mitzvot.
It is associated with the national life in the state.
It is associated with the settling of Eretz Yisrael.
It is associated with the Anglo Orthodox religious sector.
It is associated with the seriousness of Torah learning.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Religious Zionist Jewish community in Israel.
HasA: It has a stringent khumra approach to Halakha.
It has a Zionist approach to the State of Israel.
It has a belief that Israel is Atchalta De'Geulah.
It has a positive view of the secular world and Israel.
It has an emphasis placed on modesty in dress.
It has an emphasis placed on early marriage.
It has a philosophy to adhere to an open Haredi approach to Halakha and lifestyle.
It has the possibility for army service and university studies as a goal.
It has leaders such as Eliezer Waldman.
It has current leaders such as Bezalel Smotrich.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by inclining significantly toward Haredi ideology.
It is characterized by a stringent khumra approach to Halakha.
It is characterized by a Zionist approach to the State of Israel.
It is characterized by the belief that Israel is Atchalta De'Geulah.
It is characterized by being involved in the national life in the state.
It is characterized by the settling of Eretz Yisrael.
It is characterized by following a Charedi lifestyle.
It is characterized by serving in the army in religious units.
It is characterized by attending a Hesder yeshiva.
It is characterized by pursuing a work career.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Haredi ideology.
It was influenced by the thought of Zvi Yehuda Kook.
It was influenced by Abraham Isaac Kook.
It was influenced by secular influences.
It was influenced by modern educational psychology.
It was influenced by modern approaches to the study of the Bible.

About: それは、ハレディ思想に大きく傾倒するイスラエルの宗教的シオニストユダヤ人コミュニティの一部についてです。
それは、イスラエル国家に対する、イスラエルがアツルタ・デ・ゲウラーであると信じている人々の姿勢についてです。
